title: Complete Guide to Cab Service in Kolkata 2026
description: Everything you need to know about booking a cab in Kolkata — pricing, routes, vehicle options, airport transfers, and tips for the best experience.
content: Kolkata, the cultural capital of India, is a sprawling metropolitan city where getting around efficiently requires reliable transportation. Whether you're a resident commuting daily, a business traveler visiting for meetings, or a tourist exploring the City of Joy, having access to a dependable cab service is essential.

Kolkata Cab Service has been operating since 2020, serving over 5,000 happy customers across the city and 80+ cities in West Bengal, Jharkhand, Odisha, Bihar, and Uttar Pradesh. This comprehensive guide covers everything you need to know about using our cab service in Kolkata.
## Types of Cab Services Available in Kolkata

**Local Taxi (Hourly Rental):** Perfect for city sightseeing, shopping trips, hospital visits, and running errands. Our local taxi packages start from ₹1,800 for 4 hours/40 km in a Sedan. You get a dedicated driver and AC vehicle for the entire duration.

**Outstation Cab:** Planning a trip from Kolkata to Darjeeling, Puri, Digha, or any other city? Our outstation cab service covers 500+ routes with transparent pricing. One-way fares start at ₹12/km for Sedan.
**One-Way Taxi:** The most affordable option when you need a point-to-point transfer. Pay only for the one-way journey — no return fare charges. Available from Kolkata to all major cities.

**Airport Transfer:** 24/7 pickup and drop at Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose International Airport (CCU), Dum Dum. Our drivers track your flight and wait with a name board. No extra charge for flight delays.
**Wedding Car Rental:** Premium decorated vehicles for your special day. Innova Crysta with flower decoration from ₹5,000/day. Fortuner from ₹8,000/day. Professional chauffeurs included.
**Corporate Car Rental:** Monthly contracts for businesses in Kolkata. Employee transport, client meetings, business events. GST invoices provided. Dedicated account manager for corporate clients.
## Kolkata Cab Fare Chart 2026
Our pricing is transparent with no hidden charges and no surge pricing — the same rate applies 24/7, 365 days a year:
- **Sedan (Swift Dzire, Honda Amaze):** ₹12/km | Local: ₹1,800 (4hr/40km)
- **SUV (Ertiga, Innova):** ₹16/km | Local: ₹1,800 (4hr/40km)
- **Innova Crysta:** ₹18/km | Local: ₹1,800 (4hr/40km)
- **Tempo Traveller (12-17 seater):** ₹22/km | Local: ₹3,000 (4hr/40km)
All fares include fuel, driver charges, and AC. Toll and parking charges are communicated upfront before booking confirmation.
## Areas We Cover in Kolkata

We pick up and drop from every corner of Kolkata including Salt Lake (Bidhannagar), New Town (Rajarhat), Howrah, Park Street, Dum Dum, Ballygunge, Tollygunge, Barasat, Behala, Esplanade, Gariahat, Jadavpur, Lake Town, Barrackpore, and all other localities. Whether you're in North Kolkata, South Kolkata, Central Kolkata, or the suburbs — we're just a phone call away.
## How to Book a Cab in Kolkata

Booking is simple and takes less than 2 minutes: (1) Call +916204811752 or WhatsApp us, (2) Share your pickup location, destination, date, and time, (3) Choose your vehicle type, (4) Get instant confirmation with driver details. That's it — no app download required!
## Tips for Getting the Best Cab Experience in Kolkata
1. Book at least 2 hours in advance for guaranteed availability during peak hours.
2. For airport pickups, share your flight number so our driver can track your arrival.
3. For outstation trips, start early morning (5-6 AM) to avoid city traffic and reach your destination comfortably.
4. Consider round-trip booking for multi-day trips — it's more economical than separate one-way bookings.
5. Ask about our monthly packages if you need regular cab service for office commute or business meetings.

title: Kolkata to Darjeeling by Cab — Complete Road Trip Guide 2026
description: Plan your Kolkata to Darjeeling cab trip with this detailed guide covering route, fare, best time, places to visit, and booking tips.
content: Darjeeling, the Queen of Hills, is one of the most popular hill station destinations from Kolkata. Located approximately 600 km away in the northern part of West Bengal, Darjeeling offers breathtaking views of the Kanchenjunga mountain range, lush tea gardens, the iconic Darjeeling Himalayan Railway (Toy Train), and a pleasant climate that provides a perfect escape from Kolkata's heat.
## Route Details — Kolkata to Darjeeling by Cab
**Distance:** ~600 km via NH12 | **Duration:** 11-12 hours | **Best Route:** Kolkata → Durgapur → Asansol → Siliguri → Kurseong → Darjeeling

The journey from Kolkata to Darjeeling by cab takes you through the plains of Bengal before ascending into the hills after Siliguri. The road is well-maintained on the national highway stretch. The hill section from Siliguri to Darjeeling is winding but scenic, with beautiful views of tea gardens and mountains.
## Cab Fare — Kolkata to Darjeeling
- **Sedan (Swift Dzire):** Starting from ₹6,500 (one-way)
- **SUV (Ertiga/Innova):** Starting from ₹8,500 (one-way)
- **Innova Crysta:** Starting from ₹10,000 (one-way)
Round-trip fares are approximately 1.8x the one-way fare and include driver accommodation in Darjeeling.
## Best Time to Visit Darjeeling
- **March to May:** Spring season with clear skies. Best for Kanchenjunga views from Tiger Hill.
- **September to November:** Post-monsoon with fresh greenery and clear visibility.
- **December to February:** Cold but charming. Snowfall possible. Pack warm clothes.
- **Avoid June to August:** Heavy monsoon rains can cause landslides on the hill roads.
## Must-Visit Places in Darjeeling
1. **Tiger Hill** — Famous for sunrise views of Kanchenjunga and Mount Everest
2. **Batasia Loop** — War memorial with panoramic mountain views
3. **Darjeeling Himalayan Railway** — UNESCO World Heritage toy train ride
4. **Happy Valley Tea Estate** — Tour the famous Darjeeling tea gardens
5. **Mall Road** — Shopping, restaurants, and local culture
6. **Peace Pagoda** — Japanese Buddhist temple with stunning views
7. **Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park** — Home to red pandas and snow leopards
## Travel Tips
- Start from Kolkata by 4-5 AM to reach Darjeeling before dark.
- Carry warm clothes even in summer — Darjeeling temperatures can drop to 10°C.
- Book a round-trip cab if staying 2-3 days — the driver stays and takes you for local sightseeing.
- Ask your driver to stop at Siliguri for lunch — there are excellent restaurants on NH12.
## Book Your Kolkata to Darjeeling Cab
Call +916204811752 or WhatsApp us to book your Kolkata to Darjeeling cab. We provide clean AC vehicles with experienced hill drivers who know every curve of the Darjeeling road.

title: Kolkata Airport Cab Service — CCU Pickup & Drop Guide 2026
description: Complete guide to Kolkata airport cab service at Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose International Airport. Pricing, booking, and tips.
keywords: netaji subhash chandra bose airport taxi
content: Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose International Airport (IATA: CCU), located in Dum Dum, is the primary airport serving Kolkata and eastern India. Whether you're arriving on a domestic or international flight, having a reliable airport cab service ensures a smooth start or end to your journey.
## Why Choose Kolkata Cab Service for Airport Transfers

Unlike app-based aggregators with surge pricing during peak hours, Kolkata Cab Service offers fixed-rate airport transfers with no surge pricing — ever. Our drivers track your flight status in real-time and wait at the arrival gate with a name board. Even if your flight is delayed by hours, there's no extra waiting charge.
## Airport Cab Pricing
**From Kolkata Airport to City Areas:**
- Salt Lake / New Town: ₹1,200 (Sedan) | ₹1,800 (SUV)
- Park Street / Esplanade: ₹1,200 (Sedan) | ₹1,800 (SUV)
- Howrah: ₹1,200 (Sedan) | ₹1,800 (SUV)
- South Kolkata (Gariahat/Ballygunge): ₹1,200 (Sedan) | ₹1,800 (SUV)
**From Kolkata Airport to Outstation:**
Airport to any outstation destination is charged at standard per-km rates. No airport surcharge.
## How Airport Pickup Works
1. Share your flight number when booking
2. Our system tracks your flight in real-time
3. Driver reaches the airport 30 minutes before your landing
4. Driver waits at the arrival gate with a name board showing your name
5. Help with luggage and a comfortable ride to your destination
## Tips for Kolkata Airport Cab
- Book at least 4 hours before your flight arrival for guaranteed availability
- For international arrivals, our driver waits outside the customs exit area
- For drop-offs, arrive at the airport 2 hours before domestic and 3 hours before international flights
- Night flights (11 PM - 5 AM) — same rate, no night surcharge
## Book Your Airport Cab
Call +916204811752 or WhatsApp for instant airport cab booking. Available 24 hours, 7 days a week.

title: 10 Best Weekend Trips from Kolkata by Cab — 2026 Guide
description: Discover the best weekend getaways from Kolkata by car. Digha, Mandarmani, Shantiniketan, Sundarbans, and more with cab fare details.
content: Living in Kolkata and looking for a quick weekend escape? The city is surrounded by amazing destinations that are perfect for a 1-2 day trip by cab. Here are the 10 best weekend trips from Kolkata that you can enjoy with family or friends.
## 1. Digha — Beach Paradise (185 km, 4.5 hrs)

Digha is the most popular beach destination from Kolkata. The drive takes about 4.5 hours via NH116B. Old Digha has the main beach, while New Digha offers a quieter experience. Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,500 | SUV ₹3,500.
## 2. Mandarmani — Longest Beach Drive (170 km, 4 hrs)
Mandarmani boasts one of India's longest motorable beaches. You can literally drive on the beach! It's less crowded than Digha and has several beachfront resorts. Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,300 | SUV ₹3,200.
## 3. Shantiniketan — Rabindranath Tagore's Abode (165 km, 3.5 hrs)

Visit Visva-Bharati University, Tagore's ashram, and the vibrant Sonajhuri forest. The weekly Shantiniketan fair is a must-experience. Best visited during Poush Mela (December). Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,200 | SUV ₹3,000.
## 4. Sundarbans — Mangrove Wilderness (110 km, 3 hrs)

The Sundarbans, a UNESCO World Heritage site, is home to the Royal Bengal Tiger. Take a boat safari through the mangrove forests. Weekend package available with cab + boat. Cab fare: Sedan ₹1,800 | SUV ₹2,500.
## 5. Bakkhali / Henry's Island (130 km, 3.5 hrs)
A serene beach destination south of Kolkata. Less commercialized than Digha, it's perfect for a peaceful weekend. Visit the Frazerganj crocodile project nearby. Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,000 | SUV ₹2,800.
## 6. Murshidabad — Historical Capital (220 km, 5 hrs)

Explore the grandeur of Bengal's last Nawabi capital. Visit Hazarduari Palace (1,000 doors), Katra Mosque, and boat ride on the Ganges. Rich in history and culture. Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,800 | SUV ₹3,800.
## 7. Mayapur — Spiritual Hub (130 km, 3 hrs)
ISKCON's world headquarters with the magnificent Temple of the Vedic Planetarium. A spiritual and architectural marvel on the banks of the Ganges. Cab fare: Sedan ₹1,800 | SUV ₹2,500.
## 8. Tajpur — Quiet Beach (175 km, 4 hrs)

Between Mandarmani and Shankarpur, Tajpur is the most peaceful beach near Kolkata. Famous for red crabs on the beach. Perfect for couples and families seeking solitude. Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,300 | SUV ₹3,200.
## 9. Mukutmanipur — Lake Retreat (280 km, 6 hrs)
A stunning dam and reservoir in the foothills of the Chotanagpur Plateau. Boating, trekking, and beautiful sunsets. Less known and uncrowded. Cab fare: Sedan ₹3,500 | SUV ₹4,500.
## 10. Gangasagar — Sacred Pilgrimage (150 km, 4 hrs)
Where the Ganges meets the Bay of Bengal. The annual Gangasagar Mela attracts millions. Visit the Kapil Muni Temple and enjoy the sacred beach. Cab fare: Sedan ₹2,200 | SUV ₹3,000.
## How to Book Your Weekend Trip Cab
Call Kolkata Cab Service at +916204811752 or WhatsApp us. We offer special weekend packages with round-trip fares that include driver accommodation. Book early for long weekends and festival seasons!

title: Kolkata to Puri Cab — Jagannath Temple Trip Guide 2026
description: Plan your Kolkata to Puri cab trip. Complete guide with route, fare, Jagannath temple visit tips, Konark temple, and booking details.
content: Puri, home to the legendary Jagannath Temple and one of the four sacred dhams of Hinduism, is among the most sought-after pilgrimage destinations from Kolkata. The journey from Kolkata to Puri by cab covers approximately 500 km and takes around 8-9 hours via NH16.
## Route Details
**Distance:** ~500 km | **Duration:** 8-9 hours | **Best Route:** Kolkata → Kharagpur → Balasore → Bhubaneswar → Puri

The route follows NH16 (old NH5) through Odisha's coast. The road is excellent — mostly 4-lane national highway. You'll pass through Balasore, Bhadrak, and Cuttack before reaching Bhubaneswar, from where Puri is just 60 km.
## Cab Fare — Kolkata to Puri
- **Sedan:** Starting from ₹5,500 (one-way)
- **SUV:** Starting from ₹7,500 (one-way)
- **Tempo Traveller:** Starting from ₹12,000 (one-way)
Round-trip (3-day package): Sedan ₹9,000 | SUV ₹12,000 (includes local sightseeing)
## Must-Visit Places in Puri
1. **Jagannath Temple** — One of the four dhams. Non-Hindus can view from Raghunandan Library rooftop.
2. **Puri Beach** — Long sandy beach, sunrise views, and evening market
3. **Konark Sun Temple (35 km)** — UNESCO World Heritage masterpiece
4. **Chilika Lake (50 km)** — Asia's largest brackish water lagoon with dolphin spotting
5. **Raghurajpur Heritage Village** — Famous for Pattachitra paintings
## Recommended Itinerary (3 Days)
**Day 1:** Kolkata to Puri by cab (8-9 hrs). Evening: Puri beach sunset.
**Day 2:** Morning: Jagannath Temple darshan. Afternoon: Konark Sun Temple + Chandrabhaga beach. Evening: Local market.
**Day 3:** Morning: Chilika Lake boat ride (dolphins!). Afternoon: Return to Kolkata or extend stay.
## Book Your Kolkata to Puri Cab
Call +916204811752 for instant booking. Our drivers are familiar with the Kolkata-Puri route and all tourist spots. AC vehicles, clean, comfortable.

title: Kolkata Wedding Car Rental — Complete Guide 2026

**Toyota Fortuner (Decorated):** ₹8,000/day — Premium SUV for a statement entrance. Imposing presence with luxury decoration. Perfect for the groom's car.
**Luxury Sedan (Decorated):** ₹6,000/day — Elegant sedan options for a classy appearance. Available in white and dark colors.
## Decoration Options
- **Standard Package:** Flower garlands, ribbons, and bows — included in base price
- **Premium Package:** Fresh flower arrangements, LED lights, custom decorations — ₹2,000 extra
- **Royal Package:** Full floral coverage, designer decorations, red carpet service — ₹5,000 extra
## Services Included

- Decorated vehicle delivered to your doorstep

title: Kolkata to Digha Cab — Beach Road Trip Guide 2026
description: Complete guide for Kolkata to Digha cab trip. Route details, fare, best beaches, hotels, and booking information.
content: Digha is Bengal's most beloved beach destination, and the easiest beach getaway from Kolkata. Just 185 km and about 4.5 hours by cab, Digha offers a perfect weekend escape with its sandy beaches, seafood, and laid-back atmosphere.
## Route Details — Kolkata to Digha
**Distance:** 185 km | **Duration:** 4-5 hours | **Route:** Kolkata → Kolaghat → Mecheda → Contai → Digha (via NH116B)

The road is very good with smooth 4-lane highway for most of the journey. After Kolaghat, the road narrows slightly but remains comfortable. The last stretch through Contai to Digha is scenic with coconut palms and paddy fields.
## Cab Fare — Kolkata to Digha
- **Sedan:** ₹2,500 (one-way) | ₹4,500 (round trip, same day)
- **SUV:** ₹3,500 (one-way) | ₹6,000 (round trip, same day)
- **Weekend Package (2 days):** Sedan ₹5,000 | SUV ₹7,500 (includes local sightseeing)
## Best Beaches in Digha
1. **Old Digha Beach** — The main beach with all the action. Closest to town center.
2. **New Digha Beach** — Quieter, cleaner, and preferable for families.
3. **Shankarpur Beach (5 km)** — Fishing harbor with fresh seafood and peaceful vibes.
4. **Tajpur Beach (10 km)** — The hidden gem, famous for red crabs.
5. **Mandarmani Beach (15 km)** — Longest motorable beach in India.
## When to Visit Digha
- **October to March:** Best weather, pleasant temperatures
- **April to June:** Hot but less crowded. Good for budget travel.
- **Avoid July to September:** Monsoon brings rough seas and heavy rain.
## Book Your Kolkata to Digha Cab
Call +916204811752 for instant booking. We offer both one-way and round-trip cabs with experienced drivers who know the Kolkata-Digha route well.

title: Kolkata to Siliguri Cab — NH12 Travel Guide 2026
description: Book Kolkata to Siliguri cab. Route guide via NH12, fare chart, travel tips, and gateway to Darjeeling, Gangtok, and North Bengal.
content: Siliguri, the gateway to North Bengal and Northeast India, is one of the most important cities connected to Kolkata. Located approximately 560 km from Kolkata, Siliguri serves as the jumping-off point for Darjeeling, Kalimpong, Gangtok, and the entire Dooars region.
## Route Details
**Distance:** ~560 km | **Duration:** 10-11 hours | **Route:** Kolkata → Durgapur → Raiganj → Dalkhola → Siliguri (via NH12)
NH12 is the primary national highway connecting Kolkata to Siliguri. The road is a mix of 4-lane and 2-lane stretches. The journey is comfortable with multiple rest stops for food and refreshments.
## Cab Fare — Kolkata to Siliguri
- **Sedan:** Starting from ₹6,000 (one-way)
- **SUV:** Starting from ₹8,000 (one-way)
- **Tempo Traveller:** Starting from ₹13,000 (one-way)
## From Siliguri — Onward Destinations
- Darjeeling: 80 km (2.5 hrs hill drive)
- Kalimpong: 75 km (2 hrs)
- Gangtok: 125 km (4 hrs via NH10)
- Lava/Lolegaon: 60 km (2.5 hrs)
- Dooars/Jaldapara: 100 km (3 hrs)
We offer combo packages: Kolkata → Siliguri → Darjeeling → Gangtok → return. Ask for multi-destination pricing!
## Book Your Kolkata to Siliguri Cab
Call +916204811752 for instant booking. Our North Bengal specialist drivers know every route in the hills.

title: Kolkata Local Taxi Fare Chart 2026 — Complete Pricing Guide
